title: Unification Wars (disambiguation)
content:
'''Unification Wars''' can refer to:

==Canon==
*'''[[Unification Wars (Koros)|Unification Wars]]'''— a conflict waged on [[Empress Teta|Koros Major]] by [[Empress]] [[Teta]] according to the [[Qel-Droma Epics]].

==Legends==
*'''[[Unification War]]'''— a conflict in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]] that unified the [[Tapani Noble Houses]].
*'''[[Unification Wars (Galactic Republic)]]'''— a conflict that led to the formation of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].
*'''[[Unification Wars (Koros)/Legends|Unification Wars (Koros)]]'''— a conflict in the [[Empress Teta system/Legends|Koros system]].
{{Disambig}}

|es=Guerras de Unificación
